thesis: PSU energy major showing strong analyst upgrades alongside above-peer cheapness; a liquid way to express the rising-revision energy tilt with valuation support.
falsification: Revisions roll over (downgrade cycle resumes) or crude/realisations weaken so the cheapness is a value trap and it underperforms NIFTY 500 over 3-6 months.

thesis: Iron-ore PSU with strong upward revisions and above-peer value; a liquid replacement for the illiquid Vedanta steel/metal sub-entities I am exiting.
falsification: Iron-ore prices and revisions both turn down; stock lags the broad market over the next two quarters.

thesis: City-gas distributor with strong analyst-revision momentum and steady volumes; benefits from a benign gas-cost cycle.
falsification: Gas spreads compress or volumes stall and revisions fade, leaving it a market laggard.

thesis: Diversified Aditya Birla flagship with strong revisions; cement cycle plus the paints ramp give multiple cyclical levers in a liquid large/mid name.
falsification: Paints losses widen / cement pricing breaks and revisions reverse; underperforms peers.

thesis: Market-leading paints franchise where revisions have turned strongly positive after a weak patch; a quality, lower-beta add as competitive fears ease.
falsification: Competitive intensity (new entrants) re-accelerates, margins miss, and revisions roll back over.

thesis: Mid/large IT services name with strong order-book-driven revisions; diversifies the book away from its metals/financials tilt.
falsification: IT discretionary spend stays weak, deal ramps slip, and revisions fade; stock derates.

thesis: Injectables CDMO with strong revision momentum and improving US execution; a liquid quality healthcare expression.
falsification: US pricing/regulatory setback or a key approval slips and revisions reverse.

thesis: Refining margins supportive and revisions positive on a very cheap base; a small tactical-cyclical kicker.
falsification: GRMs compress sharply or the revision turns; deep cyclicality cuts both ways.

thesis: Consumer-health franchise with strong revisions and defensive earnings; anchors the lower-beta sleeve.
falsification: Revisions fade or growth disappoints versus its premium multiple.

thesis: Gold-loan NBFC with strong revisions and a supportive gold-price backdrop; quality financial exposure.
falsification: Gold price falls hard or regulatory tightening on gold loans hits growth and revisions roll over.

thesis: Category-leading eyewear retailer with strong revisions; structural premiumisation/penetration runway.
falsification: Growth decelerates or path-to-profit slips and revisions reverse; rich multiple compresses.

thesis: Online beauty leader with rising revisions and improving contribution margins; structural consumption play.
falsification: Fashion-vertical losses widen or competition compresses take-rate; revisions fade.

thesis: High-chrome grinding-media leader with rising revisions and pricing power in a global niche.
falsification: Mining capex slows or revisions turn; export demand softens.

thesis: Branded-formulations compounder with steady revisions; defensive growth in the healthcare sleeve.
falsification: Domestic branded growth stalls or revisions slip materially.

thesis: Branded-generics player with steady revisions across EM and India; quality mid-cap pharma.
falsification: Africa/EM tender weakness or margin miss and revisions roll over.

thesis: Highest-quality private bank with strong ROA and stable revisions; liquid large-cap ballast that lowers book beta.
falsification: Margin compression accelerates / credit costs rise and revisions deteriorate; lags the index.

thesis: Cheap PSU-bank leader, but revisions are turning down — keep only a small value stub.
falsification: Revisions recover and PSU re-rating resumes, in which case I under-owned it.

thesis: Keep a single liquid Vedanta exposure with mid-level revisions and cheapness, instead of five overlapping illiquid demerger lines; one defensible bet, not a cluster.
falsification: The demerged sub-entities sharply outperform the parent line, proving the parts were worth more than one consolidated holding.

thesis: Asset-light value e-commerce with large GMV runway; structural play held at a modest, not chased, weight.
falsification: Monetisation/take-rate disappoints or losses widen; revisions stay weak and it derates.

thesis: Two-wheeler leader with premiumisation and EV traction; a liquid auto cyclical with brand strength.
falsification: Two-wheeler demand stalls or EV economics disappoint; revisions weaken.

thesis: Defence electronics leader with a multi-year order book and indigenisation tailwind; structural visibility.
falsification: Order inflow slows or execution slips and the premium multiple compresses.

thesis: T&D / industrial electricals leader levered to the domestic capex and electrification cycle.
falsification: Capex cycle cools or margins miss; rich multiple derates.

thesis: Premier mall developer compounding rentals on consumption growth; quality real-estate cash flows.
falsification: Consumption slows or new-mall ramps disappoint; occupancy/rental growth stalls.

thesis: Forging leader diversifying into defence and exports; a cyclical with structural optionality, held at a measured weight.
falsification: Truck/export cycle rolls over and defence ramp slips; revisions keep falling.

thesis: High-quality forgings player with diversification beyond autos; steady execution.
falsification: Auto/industrial demand softens and margins compress; revisions weaken further.

thesis: Staples franchise with pricing power and rural recovery optionality; lowers book beta.
falsification: Input-cost spike or volume stagnation pressures margins; revisions stay soft.

thesis: Leading hospital chain with pharmacy/digital optionality; structural healthcare-demand compounding.
falsification: Occupancy/ARPOB growth stalls or digital losses widen; multiple compresses.

thesis: Bearings and precision-components leader with industrial and auto end-markets; quality franchise.
falsification: Industrial/auto demand softens and revisions keep sliding.

thesis: Cheap, well-run PSU bank, but revisions are softening; keep a reduced value position.
falsification: NIM/asset-quality deteriorate or revisions keep falling; PSU re-rating stalls.

thesis: Well-run regional private bank with steady ROA and book-value compounding.
falsification: Credit costs rise or growth slows; revisions weaken.

thesis: Integrated steel player with expansion-led volume growth; my single liquid ferrous exposure replacing the Vedanta steel sub-entity.
falsification: Steel spreads compress or expansion slips; revisions roll over.
